TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit HBColor extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor>

Docs.summary: Represents a HarfBuzz color value (hb_color_t) with BGRA byte ordering.

MemberSignature.Value: public HBColor (uint value);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int32 value) cil managed

Docs.param: The raw 32-bit BGRA color value packed as 0xBBGGRRAA.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a raw hb_color_t value.

MemberSignature.Value: public HBColor (byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int8 red, unsigned int8 green, unsigned int8 blue, unsigned int8 alpha) cil managed

Docs.param: The red channel value, in the range 0 to 255.
The green channel value, in the range 0 to 255.
The blue channel value, in the range 0 to 255.
The alpha channel value, in the range 0 (transparent) to 255 (opaque).
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from individual color channel values.

.property instance unsigned int8 Alpha

Docs.value: The alpha component, in the range 0 (transparent) to 255 (opaque).

MemberSignature.Value: public uint Value { get; }
.property instance unsigned int32 Value

Docs.summary: Gets the raw hb_color_t value with BGRA byte ordering.
Docs.value: The underlying 32-bit value packed as 0xBBGGRRAA (blue in the high byte, alpha in the low byte).
